title: Heart Attack
why_this_song: Heart Attack by Demi Lovato (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 14 times; first heard in: "If I ever did that, I think I'd have a heart attack"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "If I ever did that, I think I'd have a heart attack"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "If I ever did that, I think I'd have a heart attack"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "'Cause I don't wanna fall in love"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Never put my love out on the line"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I think I'd have a heart attack
I think I'd have a heart attack
Never break a sweat for the other guys
When you come around, I get paralyzed
'Cause I don't wanna fall in love
If I ever did that, I think I'd have a heart attack
Never put my love out on the line
Never said yes to the right guy

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Heart Attack", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Heart Attack", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Heart Attack" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Heart Attack" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Heart Attack" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Heart Attack", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
